channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US President Trump says US ‘wins’ regardless of how Iran talks go
item.description: US President Donald Trump says ‘we win regardless of what happens’ in Iran talks.

item.title: “Diplomacy is not an event, it’s a process, it takes time.”
item.description: Former Pakistani diplomat says expectations from the Islamabad talks between the US and Iran should be realistic.

item.title: Has Israeli society become conditioned to permanent war?
item.description: Opinion polls indicate opposition to ending war against Iran.

item.title: Israeli strikes kill at least 18 people across southern Lebanon
item.description: Lebanon's Health Ministry says more than 2,000 people have been killed in Israeli attacks since March 2.

item.title: Families gather to mourn victims of deadly shooting in Afghanistan
item.description: Dozens of mourners in Afghanistan gathered to pray for victims of a shooting in Herat that killed at least 11 people.

item.title: Iran’s deputy FM says Tehran has ‘upper hand’ in talks with US
item.description: Iran’s Gharibabadi says Tehran has entered negotiations from a position of strength and the war on Iran has failed.

item.title: US says two naval ships ‘transited’ Strait of Hormuz for mine-clearing
item.description: Negotiations are ongoing between US-Iranian delegations in Islamabad, with control of the strait a key sticking point.

item.title: Pakistan sends fighter jets to Saudi Arabia amid fragile US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: Deployment under mutual defence pact comes as Islamabad hosts US-Iran ceasefire talks.

item.title: Iranian rabbi describes Israel’s destruction of a Tehran synagogue
item.description: Iranian rabbi describes how he was informed that one of Tehran’s few synagogues had been destroyed in an Israel strike.

item.title: Gaza families mourn loved ones killed in overnight Israeli air strikes
item.description: Families gather over bodies outside a Gaza hospital after overnight Israeli air strikes killed seven people.
